description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Burned</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>화상</color>을 부여합니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>烧伤</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Burned</color> 2 times on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>화상</color>을 부여합니다. (최대 2회)
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。(最大2個)
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>烧伤</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。(可叠加2次)

description.en:
(Passive Effect)
<color=#ffd732>Upon death, grants [Buff_V_common_monster_passive_AP] Action Points and 4 Chain Points for each enemy.</color>

Grants <color=#28d9ed>Sustained Recovery</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color> at the start of battle.
description.kr:
(패시브 효과)
<color=#ffd732>사망 시 적 한 명당 AP [Buff_V_common_monster_passive_AP], CP 4 씩 회복시킵니다.</color>

전투 시작 시 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>지속 회복</color>효과를 얻습니다.
description.jp:
(パッシブ効果)
<color=#ffd732>倒れた時、敵全体にAPを[Buff_V_common_monster_passive_AP]、CPを4獲得させる。</color>

戦闘開始時、自分に<color=#28d9ed>継続回復</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh:
(被动效果)
<color=#ffd732>死亡时,使每个敌人的AP恢复[Buff_V_common_monster_passive_AP]、CP恢复4。</color>

战斗开始时,获得<color=#28d9ed>持续恢复</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。
